commit.message:
Add spacing between sections and use bold tags for headers

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Node height auto-fit, ordered list numbers, edit overlay improvements

- Add DOM measurement pass (measureNodeSizes) that renders all nodes into a
  hidden container and measures actual content dimensions before layout, fixing
  paragraph clipping where long text was truncated to 28px default height
- Align layout padding (8px/4px) with CSS padding to eliminate double-padding
- Reset MarkdownRenderer default margins on p/ul/ol/blockquote/pre/h1-h6
  inside node content to fix unexplained spacing
- Store ordered list numbers in parser metadata and render with escaped dot
  prefix (1\. content) so MarkdownRenderer shows "1. content" as plain text
- Change edit overlay from <input> to <textarea> with word-wrap for multi-line
  editing support
- Scale edit overlay font-size by current zoom level for visual consistency
- Add mixed-content.md test fixture covering headings, bullets, numbered lists,
  nested structures, paragraphs, inline formatting, and code blocks

Known remaining issues: node width shrink-to-fit not yet working (all sibling
nodes same width), code block rendering (tracked under Osmosis-5id).

commit.message:
Add v0.0.1 draft protocol definitions and stub services

SCMP protocol layer over gRPC with six services:
- AuthService: session establishment and logout
- MessageService: submit, list, fetch, accept, delete, list pending
- FolderService: CRUD for hierarchical mailbox folders
- KeyService: submit, rotate, revoke, lookup, fingerprint monitoring
- PolicyService: per-sender pull preferences and default policies
- NotificationService: bidirectional streaming for real-time push

Proto definitions: auth, messages, folders, keys, policy, notifications.
Stub service implementations with input validation.
Server entrypoint registering all services.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
ci: load externalized backend .env from local path before tests

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix scheduler resuming user's Claude session for cron jobs

Scheduled tasks were using the user's real chatId, causing the Claude
Agent SDK to resume the existing interactive conversation session. This
meant scheduled prompts (like Morning Report) were injected into whatever
context was already in progress — the model could then skip tool calls
or behave unpredictably based on prior conversation state.

Changed to chatId 0, which the Claude provider already handles specially:
no session resume, no session persistence, fresh context every time.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Fix UTF-8 encoding corruption in queue messages

Replace fragile btoa(unescape(encodeURIComponent(...))) /
decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(...))) pipeline with proper
TextEncoder/TextDecoder-based _utf8ToBase64/_base64ToUtf8 helpers.
Also repaired 93 existing queue entries with mojibake em-dashes.

- Sin Cloudflare Turnstile ni captcha

commit.message:
feat: adapters, infrastructure, dht-listener binary, integration test

Adapters bridging external systems to domain interfaces:
- dht: DHT sampling + OnQuery via anacrolix/dht/v2
- bittorrent: metadata retrieval stub (MSE/BEP3/LTEP)
- caterwaul: search engine stub
- sqlite: metadata store stub
- nats: NATS JetStream event bus (publish/subscribe)
- redis: dedup filter stub
- grpc: search server stub

Infrastructure:
- bus: Pipeline wiring NATS topics to typed events
- health: K8s readiness/liveness probes
- observe: Prometheus metrics (shoal_* namespace)

cmd/dht-listener: first binary — discovers info hashes via DHT
sampling and publishes to NATS. Includes metrics and health endpoints.

Integration test validates domain types interoperate correctly.
All 22 packages compile, vet clean, tests pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add pgngen: NMEA 2000 PGN code generator and decoder library (#25)

* Add implementation ideas document with 32 feature proposals

Curated list of potential features and improvements organized by
category: data decoding, monitoring, web/client, data export,
security, cloud, CAN protocol, developer experience, and API
enhancements. Includes suggested starting points by effort level.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01STA7vrvbeCVKwh7tdJQMxy

* Add PGN decoder library with DSL, code generators, and initial definitions

Introduces a complete PGN definition and code generation pipeline:

DSL (.pgn files):
- Custom DSL for defining NMEA 2000 packet structures with bit-level
  field layouts, scaling factors, units, and named enumerations
- 4 definition files covering 27 PGNs: navigation (heading, position,
  COG/SOG, depth, speed, wind), engine (RPM, oil, battery, fluid level),
  environment (temperature, humidity, pressure), and system (address
  claim, product info)
- 7 enum types (HeadingReference, SpeedType, WindReference,
  TemperatureSource, HumiditySource, PressureSource, DirectionReference)

Code generators (pgngen/):
- Go: structs with JSON tags, Decode/Encode functions, PGN registry,
  enum types with String() methods and constants
- Protobuf: proto3 messages with oneof DecodedPGN wrapper
- JSON Schema: full schema with $defs for each PGN and enum
- Hand-rolled recursive descent parser, no external dependencies

Generated code (pgn/):
- Handles byte-aligned and bit-packed fields (read-modify-write for
  sub-byte fields), little-endian, signed/unsigned, scaled floats
- Round-trip encode/decode tested for position, wind, battery, heading,
  depth, product info, and bit-packed fluid level fields

CLI tool (cmd/pgngen):
  pgngen -defs pgn/defs -go pgn -proto pgn/proto -jsonschema pgn/schema.json

https://claude.ai/code/session_01STA7vrvbeCVKwh7tdJQMxy

* Move PGN code generation to build time instead of committing generated files

- Add `go:generate` directive in pgn/generate.go that runs pgngen
- Add `generate` target to Makefile; make build/test/lint depend on it
- Add `before.hooks` to .goreleaser.yaml so releases run go generate
- Add generated files to .gitignore (pgn_gen.go, helpers_gen.go, proto/, schema.json)
- Remove generated files from git tracking

Workflow: `go generate ./pgn/...` or `make generate` to regenerate from
the .pgn DSL definitions in pgn/defs/.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01STA7vrvbeCVKwh7tdJQMxy

* Add go generate step to CI workflow before test/vet/lint

Generated pgn code is no longer committed, so CI must run
go generate before building or testing.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01STA7vrvbeCVKwh7tdJQMxy

* Fix staticcheck QF1012: use fmt.Fprintf instead of WriteString(Sprintf)

https://claude.ai/code/session_01STA7vrvbeCVKwh7tdJQMxy

* Wire PGN decoding into lplexdump with -decode flag

Add -decode flag that uses the pgn.Registry to decode known PGNs and
display human-readable field values. In terminal mode, decoded JSON
appears on a continuation line below each frame. In JSON mode, a
"decoded" field is added to each frame object when the PGN is known.

https://claude.ai/code/session_01STA7vrvbeCVKwh7tdJQMxy

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

Replace Unicode zodiac glyphs with SVG path symbols
